title: TenPuru: No One Can Live on Loneliness
description:
Akagami Akemitsu has spent his entire life trying to avoid relationships and worldly desires after being influenced by his father’s irresponsible lifestyle. Determined to live a disciplined and isolated life, he decides to become a monk and joins a temple in hopes of escaping temptation. However, upon arriving, he quickly discovers that the temple is filled with several beautiful young women, turning his peaceful plans into complete chaos.

As Akemitsu struggles to maintain his self-control while helping manage the temple, he slowly forms bonds with the residents and begins understanding the importance of companionship, trust, and emotional connection. Between awkward misunderstandings, romantic tension, and hilarious situations, TenPuru combines comedy, romance, and slice-of-life storytelling into a fun and energetic series about resisting temptation while discovering what truly matters in life.
